description: The paris hilton fragrance for women from Paris Hilton is a sweet fragrance with a blend of notes like frozen apple, peach, muguet with a heart of freesia, mimosa, jasmine, tuberose. Dry down has notes of musk, sandalwood, ylang ylang and oakmoss.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
